title: armeria pseudarmeria subsp. villosa
intro: Armeria pseudarmeria subsp. villosa, commonly known as the Sea Thrift, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carnation family. This perennial plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat digestive issues and wounds, due to the presence of glycosides and flavonoids. The health benefits of Armeria pseudarmeria subsp. villosa include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction for medicinal use, typically steeping the flowers and leaves in hot water to create a soothing tea.
